title: openai/codex-plugin-cc
abstract: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks. OpenAI's official plugin that connects Claude Code with OpenAI Codex, enabling cross-platform AI coding collaboration.
abstract_zh: OpenAI官方出品！在Claude Code中直接调用Codex审查代码或委派任务。打通Claude Code和OpenAI Codex两大AI编码平台，实现跨平台AI编码协作。
